DEF: UNITED-STATES-SECRET-SERVICE(USSS)
DEF: NATIONAL-SPECIAL-SECURITY-EVENTS(NSSE)
DEF: HOMELAND-SECURITY-AND-GOVERNMENTAL-AFFAIRS(HSGAC)

DURING-ACT-PERIOD:
  SEC11223(B)(2)(DIV-K,PUBLAW117-263) SUBSTITUTE SHALL-NOT-APPLY FOR SHALL-APPLY

SEC:134:
  APPORTION (SEC101→DHS:FEMA-DRF) UP-TO RATE=OPERATIONS FOR STAFFORD-DR/EM-ASSISTANCE
  [42 USC5121 ET SEQ]

SEC:135:
  APPORTION (SEC101→DHS:USSS-OPS/SUPP) UP-TO RATE=OPERATIONS FOR PROTECTIVE-OPERATIONS
  ∧ NSSE ∧ 2024-PRESIDENTIAL-CAMPAIGN

SEC:136:
  ADDITIONAL-APPROP=USD231M→DHS:USSS-OPS/SUPP FOR FY2025 UNTIL 2025-09-30
  FOR PROTECTIVE-OPERATIONS ∧ NSSE ∧ 2024-PRESIDENTIAL-CAMPAIGN
  PROVIDED:
    30-DAYS-AFTER-ENACTMENT DIRECTOR(USSS) PROVIDE EXPENDITURE-PLAN
      →HOUSE/SENATE-APPROPRIATIONS; DETAIL BY PROGRAM/PROJECT/ACTIVITY FOR OPS/SUPP
    MONTHLY REPORTS ON EXPENDITURE-PLAN EXECUTION
    NO OBLIGATION UNTIL DHS-SECRETARY TRANSMITS MISSION-ASSURANCE-REPORT
      →HOUSE TASK-FORCE('ATTEMPTED-ASSASSINATION OF D.J.TRUMP') ∧ SENATE:HSGAC
    15-DAYS-AFTER-ENACTMENT DHS-SECRETARY PROVIDE MATERIALS
      →HOUSE TASK-FORCE('ATTEMPTED-ASSASSINATION OF D.J.TRUMP') FROM LETTERS DATED 2024-08-12 ∧ 2024-08-28
    DIRECTOR(USSS) RESPOND TIMELY TO OVERSIGHT-INQUIRIES(DOCS/INFO/TESTIMONY)
      ON PROTECTIVE-OPERATIONS FUNDED BY THIS ACT ∨ PUBLAW118-47 FROM:
        HOUSE TASK-FORCE('ATTEMPTED-ASSASSINATION OF D.J.TRUMP')
        HOUSE COMMITTEES: APPROPRIATIONS ∧ HOMELAND-SECURITY ∧ OVERSIGHT-AND-ACCOUNTABILITY ∧ JUDICIARY
        SENATE COMMITTEES: APPROPRIATIONS ∧ JUDICIARY ∧ HSGAC
    TIMELY=BY DEADLINE SPECIFIED BY REQUESTING-COMMITTEE/SUBCOMMITTEE

SEC:137:
  APPLY: NFIA1968 SECS1309(A),1319 SUBSTITUTE SECTION106(3)-DATE FOR '2023-09-30'
  NOW:EFFECTIVE UPON ENACTMENT
  FUTURE COND: IF ENACTMENT>2024-09-30 APPLY RETROACTIVE TO 2024-09-30

SEC:138:
  DURING-ACT-PERIOD APPLY: HERMITS-PEAK/CALF-CANYON-ASSISTANCE-ACT SEC104
    SUBSTITUTE SECTION106(3)-DATE FOR '2YRS-AFTER-FIRST-PROMULGATION' ∧ '2024-05-31'
  REPURPOSED-AMOUNTS PREVIOUSLY DESIGNATED EMERGENCY(BBEDCA/RES-BUDGET)
    DESIGNATED EMERGENCY PER BBEDCA SEC251(B)(2)(A)(i)

SEC:139:
  ADDITIONAL-APPROP: DOI:'NATIONAL-PARK-SERVICE—OPERATION-OF-NATIONAL-PARK-SYSTEM'
    =RATE=USD5M FOR SECURITY ∧ VISITOR-SAFETY→PRESIDENTIAL-INAUGURAL-CEREMONIES

SEC:140
